title: Changing asset values
summary: 9706 — depreciation, disposal of non-current assets, and revaluation.
learningObjectives: Calculate depreciation using straight-line and reducing balance.
Prepare disposal accounts and profit/loss on disposal.
Explain revaluation and its journal entries.

simpleExplanation.title: Assets lose value over time
simpleExplanation.summary: Depreciation spreads asset cost over useful life — disposals remove cost and accumulated depreciation, with any difference as profit or loss.
steps: Reducing balance — % on NBV each year.
Disposal — DR disposal, CR asset and acc dep.
Revaluation — adjust asset to fair value.

sections.content: **Changing asset values** (1.3.2) — show **full disposal T-account working**.
